description: Ecuadorian criminal and narcoterrorist organization dedicated to drug trafficking, contract killing, and other crimes. Originally an armed wing of Los Choneros, it split off in 2020 after the assassination of its former leader Jorge Luis Zambrano. Based primarily in Guayas province with its center of operations in Durán. The group has been involved in prison massacres and terrorist attacks, and maintains a territorial dispute with the Latin Kings since 2023.
